title: berberidaceae
intro: Berberidaceae is a family of flowering plants that includes approximately 600 species. It is a diverse group of plants commonly known as barberries and their relatives. This family is characterized by its unique combination of features, such as the presence of a distinctive alkaloid called berberine, and the shape of its leaves and flowers. Berberidaceae is found in a wide range of habitats around the world, from tropical to temperate regions.
